auth.forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
auth.forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotPassword.fields.email.label: Email
auth.forgotPassword.sent.title: Check your inbox
auth.forgotPassword.sent.descriptionSuff: we've sent a reset link. It may take a minute; check spam if you don't see it.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set new password
auth.resetPassword.description.missingTo: Use the link from your email to set a new password. If you landed here by mistake, request a new link from the sign-in page.
auth.resetPassword.done.title: Password updated
auth.resetPassword.errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or request a new link.
authLayoutFooter.welcomeDescription: Sign in to securely compare stacks, save recipes, and ship with confidence.
cta.description: Explore real codebases, copy battle-tested architecture decisions, and skip weeks of trial and error. Open the app and get cooking.
cta.heading: Ready to cook?
features.header.description: Built for solo developers, student projects, startups, and growing product teams. Learn from real shipped codebases and launch with fewer blind spots.
hero.description.primary: Eat the boilerplate. A platform of proven cookbooks from real kitchens ― plus an AI assistant built from experience.
hero.description.secondary: Secret sauce: proven patterns from teams that ship.
howItWorks.description: The recipes are a curated intelligence layer for learning from real products and applying those lessons to your own.
howItWorks.heading: How teams ship faster with saas.recipes
landingFooter.description: Discover battle-tested open source SaaS projects, compare their stacks, workflows, and AI setup. Ship faster with implementation patterns you can trust.

testimonials.description: Solo developers and product teams use SaaS Recipes to launch faster and avoid reinventing the wheel.
testimonials.heading: Built for All Kitchens
